open.title: Evotel outage | Postmasburg
open.description: Evotel has informed us of a network outage affecting Postmasburg, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Evotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: The Evotel team remains on-site working to restore services to the remaining affected clients. Significant progress has been made, with the majority of affected clients now reconnected, and the team is focused on restoring service to the remaining few. Splicing operations are continuing, and the remaining affected clients can expect their services to be restored as the repair work progresses.

Evotel team is back on-site working on restoring service to the remaining affected clients. We assure all clients that restoring service is our priority and sincerely apologise for the inconvenience this has caused.

The Evotel team is currently completing repairs on the remaining fibre cables as part of the restoration process. Once this work has been finalised, the network will need to be tested to confirm that all services have been successfully restored. Testing will commence once power has been restored at 18:00 PM
